shutdown: Bridge is shutting down ({signal}). Running tasks may be interrupted.
queue: Previous request is still processing. Queued — will execute automatically when done.

session.executeTrigger: Please execute the task described above.

commands.stopNotFound: No running task in this thread.
commands.modeShow:
Current permission mode: **{current}** ({scope})
Default: `{defaultMode}`

Available modes:
- `full-auto` — All tools pre-approved, no prompts
- `auto` — Background classifier reviews actions
- `acceptEdits` — Auto-accept file edits
- `plan` — Read-only analysis, no edits
- `dontAsk` — Only pre-approved tools allowed
commands.modeChanged: <@{userId}> switched this thread's permission mode to **{mode}**
commands.approveNoSession: No session to retry in this thread. Send a message to Claude first.
